$comment: Files the @vizor-vr/player npm package ships in dist/, per its package.json exports. PlayerScriptTest locks PlayerScript::DIST_ENTRY against this list so the Blade directive can never reference a file that does not exist in the published tarball (the 0.1.0 era shipped a URL that 404'd). Update alongside player releases (sync-player-version.yml bumps the version; a dist-layout change must update this manifest).
